commands.command: vp run hello#build # should build the library from root

commands: ls packages/hello/dist # should have the library
vp run hello#build 2>&1 | grep 'cache hit' # should hit cache from root
cd packages/hello && vp run build 2>&1 | grep 'cache hit' # should hit cache from sub dir

commands.command: cd packages/hello && vp pack 2>&1 # direct vp pack should not be cached

commands: cd packages/hello && vp pack 2>&1 | grep -c 'cache' || echo 'no cache' # direct vp pack has no cache
vp run hello#build 2>&1 | grep 'cache miss' # should miss cache after source change

commands.command: cd packages/array-config && vp run build # should build the library from sub dir

commands: ls packages/array-config/dist # should have the library
cd packages/array-config && vp run build 2>&1 | grep 'cache hit' # should hit cache from sub dir
vp run array-config#build 2>&1 | grep 'cache hit' # should hit cache from root after sub dir build

commands.command: vp run default-config#build # should build the library from root

commands: ls packages/default-config/dist # should have the library
cd packages/default-config && vp run build 2>&1 | grep 'cache hit' # should hit cache from sub dir
